actions.rationale: Wave Plan header still said 'v9 — current' after v10 launch + v11 close. Refreshed to v11 — current with the canonical 6-track layout (T0..T5) from plans/2026-06-20-v11-dag-router-rebuild.md.
Extended the orchestrator worklog with a session wrap so the next wave (v12 or v11 §8 decision) has a clean handoff.

v10.outcome: Shipped. AGENTS.md was updated in commit fad4fc2755 to point to the v10 plan; v10 is now rolled into v11 per the team's planner.

v11.outcome: Complete — awaiting §8 user decision (router architecture: Option A vs B vs C). 6.5-week critical path is gated on Option B approval.

v12_candidates: V11 §8 decision: pick router architecture (Option A ship-router, Option B lightweight-pass-through, Option C both-greens). 6.5-week critical path.
T2A/T2B/T2C tier-0 audit findings — 13 new findings/2026-06-2* files. Read each, dedupe, decide which to action now vs defer to v12.
L5-110 substrate audit: 9 drift findings + 6 forward-looking ADRs (ADR-046..049) to author or close.
L5-117 pheno-capacity absorb into phenotype-gateway: verified in v9 wrap (4898bc3). Migration scripts ADR pending.
pheno-plugin-registry (L3-57 carry from v7): unowned, surface for next wave.
pheno-tracing canonical: ADR-036 re-affirmed in v9; spread the OTLP exporter adoption beyond pheno-port-adapter (the only adopter so far).
macbook_only_suggestions: Draft ADR-046 (federation mTLS+OIDC) — pure markdown, blocks cross-org service auth.
Draft ADR-047 (predictive DRY, 4-criterion rule) — codifies the duplication-prevention discipline.
Author the 5 missing meta-bundle files (AGENTS.md + llms.txt + WORKLOG.md + CHANGELOG.md + LICENSE-MIT) for any of the 5 pheno-* crates that landed since 2026-06-18 (check via worklog grep).
Refresh AGENTS.md Stale/warnings section: add AGENTS.md 'v10 = rolled into v11' annotation + 'v11 = complete, awaiting §8' annotation.
